case_title: PLUG BUSTERS VS TRINITY BUSINESS COLLEGE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLUG BUSTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY BUSINESS COLLEGE $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY BUSINESS COLLEGE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-13-1999, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-29-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CHECK FOR $40.00 RETURNED TO GOLDEN STATE TRINITY COLLEGE WITH INFO TO PAY $40.00 COSTS TO PLAINTIFF;
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,190.00 FILED BY PLUG BUSTERS AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY BUSINESS COLLEGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-26-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFT TO GIVE PLFT $3000 IN BARTER DOLLARS BY 8/20/ 99. THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO RELFECT THE CORRECT DEFT TRINITY BUSINESS COLLEGE. GARY YASUDA IS DISM
